The '''Independent Provisional Government of Rendili''' was a government that took over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], shifting its allegiance from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Shortly afterward, a Republic task force captured the [[Rendili Home Defense Fleet]]; presumably, the Independent Provisional Government fell shortly afterward.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 69|''Republic'' 69]]
*[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]]
*[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]]
